calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arthur Liu Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per.
You Liang Song Defendant/Appellant in pro per.

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

You Liang Song Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf with the assistance of the Court Interpreter.

Arthur Liu Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.
You Liang Song Defendant/Appellant responds extensively.

The matter is submitted.
At the conclusion of the trial, the Court rules in open Court as follows:

The Court affirms the ruling made by Judge Tong. The arbitration award is binding in this matter the Court does not find that Arthur Liu Plaintiff/Respondent must pay any money to You Liang Song Defendant/Appellant, and vice versa.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-10-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504
